message:
Revert "Reapply "Update superpowers plugin path to plugins/superpowers-bootstrap""

This reverts commit d12350b4b07bb50f691ef370736f2d036ec043c4.

files.patch:
@@ -13,8 +13,7 @@
       "name": "superpowers",
       "source": {
         "source": "url",
-        "url": "https://github.com/obra/superpowers.git",
-        "path": "plugins/superpowers-bootstrap"
+        "url": "https://github.com/obra/superpowers.git"
       },
       "description": "Core skills library: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques",
       "version": "2.0.4",
